rationale: TestFederationChaosSuite covers all six AC scenarios end-to-end against real HTTP routes with explicit status-transition assertions; deterministic (per-node deadlines + reconcile, no sleeps gating correctness); verified -count=3 per commit message.

findings.summary: Hub crash modeled via connection hijack/close (in-process analogue of mid-call transport failure) — reasonable proxy; a true process-kill chaos test isn't feasible in-process.
Slow-spoke scenario uses a 1500ms upper bound for a 150ms per-node deadline — generous but appropriate for CI jitter; honors r.Context().Done() so handler exits cleanly.
